member.name: T:MultiTenantAuth.AspNetCore.Abstractions.ITenantContextAccessor
member.summary: Provides access to the for the current request. The context is scoped to the async execution context (AsyncLocal) and cleared automatically after the request completes.

member.name: P:MultiTenantAuth.AspNetCore.Abstractions.ITenantContextAccessor.Current
member.summary: Gets or sets the for the current request. Returns null before the middleware has run or when resolution failed.

member.name: T:MultiTenantAuth.AspNetCore.Abstractions.ITenantResolver
member.summary: Resolves a tenant from the current HTTP request. Implement this interface and register it in DI to supply a custom resolution strategy.

member.name: M:MultiTenantAuth.AspNetCore.Abstractions.ITenantResolver.ResolveAsync(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.HttpContext,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Attempts to resolve a tenant from the given .

member.name: T:MultiTenantAuth.AspNetCore.Abstractions.ITenantValidator
member.summary: Validates that the authenticated user is permitted to access the resolved tenant. Implement this interface to replace the built-in claims-based validator.

member.name: M:MultiTenantAuth.AspNetCore.Abstractions.ITenantValidator.ValidateAsync(MultiTenantAuth.AspNetCore.Models.TenantContext,System.Security.Claims.ClaimsPrincipal,Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.HttpContext,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Validates that is authorised for .

member.name: T:MultiTenantAuth.AspNetCore.Constants.TenantConstants
member.summary: Well-known constants used throughout the multi-tenant auth middleware.

member.name: F:MultiTenantAuth.AspNetCore.Constants.TenantConstants.DefaultTenantHeaderName
member.summary: Default HTTP header name used to carry the tenant identifier.

member.name: F:MultiTenantAuth.AspNetCore.Constants.TenantConstants.DefaultTenantRouteValueName
member.summary: Default route value key used to carry the tenant identifier.

member.name: F:MultiTenantAuth.AspNetCore.Constants.TenantConstants.DefaultTenantQueryStringName
member.summary: Default query string key used to carry the tenant identifier (disabled by default).

member.name: F:MultiTenantAuth.AspNetCore.Constants.TenantConstants.DefaultTenantClaimType
member.summary: Default JWT / claim type used to identify the tenant.

member.name: F:MultiTenantAuth.AspNetCore.Constants.TenantConstants.DefaultAllowedTenantsClaimType
member.summary: Default claim type that lists all tenants a user is allowed to access.

member.name: F:MultiTenantAuth.AspNetCore.Constants.TenantConstants.DefaultMaxTenantIdLength
member.summary: Maximum allowed length for a tenant identifier.

member.name: F:MultiTenantAuth.AspNetCore.Constants.TenantConstants.DefaultMaxTenantSlugLength
member.summary: Maximum allowed length for a tenant slug.

member.name: F:MultiTenantAuth.AspNetCore.Constants.TenantConstants.DefaultAllowedTenantPattern
member.summary: The regex-compatible allowed character pattern for tenant identifiers. Allows letters, digits, hyphens, and underscores only.

member.name: T:MultiTenantAuth.AspNetCore.Extensions.ApplicationBuilderExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for adding to the pipeline.

member.name: M:MultiTenantAuth.AspNetCore.Extensions.ApplicationBuilderExtensions.UseMultiTenantAuth(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Builder.IApplicationBuilder)
T:MultiTenantAuth.AspNetCore.Extensions.ServiceCollectionExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for registering multi-tenant auth services in the DI container.

member.name: M:MultiTenantAuth.AspNetCore.Extensions.ServiceCollectionExtensions.AddMultiTenantAuth(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection)
member.summary: Registers multi-tenant auth services with default options.

member.name: M:MultiTenantAuth.AspNetCore.Extensions.ServiceCollectionExtensions.AddMultiTenantAuth(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,System.Action{MultiTenantAuth.AspNetCore.Options.MultiTenantAuthOptions})
member.summary: Registers multi-tenant auth services with the provided configuration delegate.

member.name: T:MultiTenantAuth.AspNetCore.Internal.TenantContextAccessor
member.summary: Default implementation backed by an so that each async execution context (request) gets an isolated, independently mutable slot.

member.name: T:MultiTenantAuth.AspNetCore.Internal.TenantFormatValidator
member.summary: Validates tenant identifier format to prevent injection, spoofing, or oversized inputs. Uses simple length checks first to avoid regex overhead on obviously invalid values.

member.name: M:MultiTenantAuth.AspNetCore.Internal.TenantFormatValidator.IsValid(System.String,MultiTenantAuth.AspNetCore.Options.MultiTenantAuthOptions)
member.summary: Returns true when is a well-formed tenant id.

member.name: M:MultiTenantAuth.AspNetCore.Internal.TenantFormatValidator.IsValidSlug(System.String,MultiTenantAuth.AspNetCore.Options.MultiTenantAuthOptions)
member.summary: Returns true when is a well-formed tenant slug.

member.name: T:MultiTenantAuth.AspNetCore.Middleware.MultiTenantAuthMiddleware
member.summary: ASP.NET Core middleware that resolves the tenant context and enforces tenant-aware authentication / authorization for every request.
Initialises a new instance of .

member.name: M:MultiTenantAuth.AspNetCore.Middleware.MultiTenantAuthMiddleware.InvokeAsync(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.HttpContext,MultiTenantAuth.AspNetCore.Abstractions.ITenantContextAccessor,System.IServiceProvider)
member.summary: Processes the request.

member.name: T:MultiTenantAuth.AspNetCore.Models.TenantContext
member.summary: Represents the resolved tenant context for the current HTTP request.

member.name: P:MultiTenantAuth.AspNetCore.Models.TenantContext.TenantId
member.summary: The unique identifier of the resolved tenant.

member.name: P:MultiTenantAuth.AspNetCore.Models.TenantContext.TenantSlug
member.summary: An optional human-readable slug for the tenant (e.g. from subdomain).

member.name: P:MultiTenantAuth.AspNetCore.Models.TenantContext.Source
member.summary: Describes which resolution strategy produced this context (e.g. "header", "route", "subdomain", "claim", "querystring", "custom").

member.name: P:MultiTenantAuth.AspNetCore.Models.TenantContext.IsResolved
member.summary: Indicates that a tenant was successfully resolved.

member.name: T:MultiTenantAuth.AspNetCore.Models.TenantResolutionResult
member.summary: Carries the outcome of a tenant resolution attempt.

member.name: M:MultiTenantAuth.AspNetCore.Models.TenantResolutionResult.Success(MultiTenantAuth.AspNetCore.Models.TenantContext)
member.summary: Gets a result that indicates successful resolution.

member.name: M:MultiTenantAuth.AspNetCore.Models.TenantResolutionResult.Fail(System.String)
member.summary: Gets a result that indicates the tenant could not be resolved.

member.name: P:MultiTenantAuth.AspNetCore.Models.TenantResolutionResult.Succeeded
member.summary: Whether the tenant was resolved.

member.name: P:MultiTenantAuth.AspNetCore.Models.TenantResolutionResult.Tenant
member.summary: The resolved tenant context; null when is false.

member.name: P:MultiTenantAuth.AspNetCore.Models.TenantResolutionResult.FailureReason
member.summary: Internal failure reason. Never exposed directly in HTTP responses.

member.name: T:MultiTenantAuth.AspNetCore.Models.TenantValidationResult
member.summary: Carries the outcome of a tenant validation attempt against the authenticated user.

member.name: M:MultiTenantAuth.AspNetCore.Models.TenantValidationResult.Success
member.summary: Gets a result indicating the user is authorised for this tenant.

member.name: M:MultiTenantAuth.AspNetCore.Models.TenantValidationResult.Fail(System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Gets a result indicating the user is not authorised for this tenant.

member.name: P:MultiTenantAuth.AspNetCore.Models.TenantValidationResult.Succeeded
member.summary: Whether validation passed.

member.name: P:MultiTenantAuth.AspNetCore.Models.TenantValidationResult.StatusCode
member.summary: HTTP status code to return on failure. Typically 401 (unauthenticated) or 403 (authenticated but unauthorised).

member.name: P:MultiTenantAuth.AspNetCore.Models.TenantValidationResult.FailureReason
member.summary: Internal failure reason. Never exposed directly in HTTP responses.

member.name: T:MultiTenantAuth.AspNetCore.Options.MultiTenantAuthOptions
member.summary: Configuration options for the multi-tenant auth middleware.

member.name: P:MultiTenantAuth.AspNetCore.Options.MultiTenantAuthOptions.Enabled
member.summary: When false the middleware is a no-op and passes every request through. Useful for local development or feature-flag controlled roll-outs. Default: true.

member.name: P:MultiTenantAuth.AspNetCore.Options.MultiTenantAuthOptions.ResolutionOrder
member.summary: The ordered list of strategies the middleware tries in sequence. The first strategy that returns a non-empty tenant id wins. Default: RouteValue → Header → Subdomain → Claim.

member.name: P:MultiTenantAuth.AspNetCore.Options.MultiTenantAuthOptions.EnableHeaderResolution
member.summary: Allow tenant resolution from an HTTP header. Default: true.

member.name: P:MultiTenantAuth.AspNetCore.Options.MultiTenantAuthOptions.EnableRouteResolution
member.summary: Allow tenant resolution from a route value. Default: true.

member.name: P:MultiTenantAuth.AspNetCore.Options.MultiTenantAuthOptions.EnableSubdomainResolution
member.summary: Allow tenant resolution from the request subdomain. Default: true.

member.name: P:MultiTenantAuth.AspNetCore.Options.MultiTenantAuthOptions.EnableClaimResolution
member.summary: Allow tenant resolution from a JWT/identity claim. Default: true.

member.name: P:MultiTenantAuth.AspNetCore.Options.MultiTenantAuthOptions.EnableQueryStringResolution
member.summary:
Allow tenant resolution from a query-string parameter.
WARNING: Disabled by default. Query-string tenant values are trivially manipulated and can introduce CSRF/phishing risks. Enable only when you have additional protections in place and fully understand the trade-offs.

member.name: P:MultiTenantAuth.AspNetCore.Options.MultiTenantAuthOptions.TenantHeaderName
member.summary: HTTP header name carrying the tenant identifier. Default: X-Tenant-Id.

member.name: P:MultiTenantAuth.AspNetCore.Options.MultiTenantAuthOptions.TenantRouteValueName
member.summary: Route value key carrying the tenant identifier. Default: tenantId.

member.name: P:MultiTenantAuth.AspNetCore.Options.MultiTenantAuthOptions.TenantQueryStringName
member.summary: Query-string parameter name. Default: tenantId.

member.name: P:MultiTenantAuth.AspNetCore.Options.MultiTenantAuthOptions.TenantClaimType
member.summary: Claim type that carries the primary tenant identifier. Default: tenant_id.

member.name: P:MultiTenantAuth.AspNetCore.Options.MultiTenantAuthOptions.AllowedTenantsClaimType
member.summary: Claim type that lists all tenants the user may access (comma-separated or multiple claims). Default: allowed_tenants.

member.name: P:MultiTenantAuth.AspNetCore.Options.MultiTenantAuthOptions.RequireAuthenticatedUser
member.summary: When true, requests from unauthenticated users are rejected with 401. Default: true.

member.name: P:MultiTenantAuth.AspNetCore.Options.MultiTenantAuthOptions.RequireResolvedTenant
member.summary: When true, requests where a tenant cannot be resolved are rejected. Default: true.

member.name: P:MultiTenantAuth.AspNetCore.Options.MultiTenantAuthOptions.RequireTenantClaim
member.summary: When true, the authenticated user must have a claim matching the resolved tenant. Default: true.

member.name: P:MultiTenantAuth.AspNetCore.Options.MultiTenantAuthOptions.MaxTenantIdLength
member.summary: Maximum length of a tenant identifier. Default: 64.

member.name: P:MultiTenantAuth.AspNetCore.Options.MultiTenantAuthOptions.MaxTenantSlugLength
member.summary: Maximum length of a tenant slug. Default: 100.

member.name: P:MultiTenantAuth.AspNetCore.Options.MultiTenantAuthOptions.AllowedTenantPattern
member.summary: Regex pattern that a tenant identifier must match. Default allows letters, digits, hyphens, and underscores. Set to null to skip pattern validation.

member.name: P:MultiTenantAuth.AspNetCore.Options.MultiTenantAuthOptions.ReturnNotFoundForUnknownTenant
member.summary: Return HTTP 404 instead of 400 when the resolved tenant is unknown/not found. Useful to avoid leaking which tenant IDs exist. Default: false.

member.name: P:MultiTenantAuth.AspNetCore.Options.MultiTenantAuthOptions.CustomResolverType
member.summary: Optional custom tenant resolver factory. When set and is included in , this resolver is invoked. The resolver is resolved from DI; register it with services.AddSingleton<ITenantResolver, MyResolver>() and set this property to the same type, or use the extension method overload.

member.name: P:MultiTenantAuth.AspNetCore.Options.MultiTenantAuthOptions.CustomValidatorType
member.summary: Optional custom tenant validator factory type. When set, replaces the built-in claims-based validator. Register the type in DI before calling AddMultiTenantAuth.

member.name: T:MultiTenantAuth.AspNetCore.Options.MultiTenantAuthOptionsValidator
member.summary: Validates at application startup so that misconfigurations cause an immediate, descriptive error rather than a silent runtime failure during request processing.

member.name: T:MultiTenantAuth.AspNetCore.Options.TenantResolutionStrategy
member.summary: Defines the available strategies for resolving a tenant from an HTTP request.

member.name: F:MultiTenantAuth.AspNetCore.Options.TenantResolutionStrategy.None
member.summary: No resolution; tenant context will not be populated.

member.name: F:MultiTenantAuth.AspNetCore.Options.TenantResolutionStrategy.Subdomain
member.summary: Resolve from the first subdomain label of the request host.

member.name: F:MultiTenantAuth.AspNetCore.Options.TenantResolutionStrategy.Header
member.summary: Resolve from a request header (default: X-Tenant-Id).

member.name: F:MultiTenantAuth.AspNetCore.Options.TenantResolutionStrategy.RouteValue
member.summary: Resolve from a route value (default: tenantId).

member.name: F:MultiTenantAuth.AspNetCore.Options.TenantResolutionStrategy.Claim
member.summary: Resolve from a JWT / identity claim (default: tenant_id).

member.name: F:MultiTenantAuth.AspNetCore.Options.TenantResolutionStrategy.QueryString
member.summary:
Resolve from a query-string parameter.
WARNING: Query-string tenant resolution is disabled by default. Enable only when you fully understand the security implications (e.g. link-sharing, CSRF surface).

member.name: F:MultiTenantAuth.AspNetCore.Options.TenantResolutionStrategy.Custom
member.summary: Resolve using a custom ITenantResolver registered in DI.

member.name: T:MultiTenantAuth.AspNetCore.Resolvers.ClaimTenantResolver
member.summary: Resolves the tenant from the authenticated user's JWT/identity claim (default claim type: tenant_id).

member.name: T:MultiTenantAuth.AspNetCore.Resolvers.HeaderTenantResolver
member.summary: Resolves the tenant from a request HTTP header (default: X-Tenant-Id).

member.name: T:MultiTenantAuth.AspNetCore.Resolvers.QueryStringTenantResolver
member.summary:
Resolves the tenant from a query-string parameter.
WARNING: Disabled by default via . Query-string values are easily manipulated by attackers via link-sharing and browser history. Only enable this in scenarios where you have additional protections (e.g. short-lived signed URLs).

member.name: T:MultiTenantAuth.AspNetCore.Resolvers.RouteValueTenantResolver
member.summary: Resolves the tenant from a route value (default key: tenantId).

member.name: T:MultiTenantAuth.AspNetCore.Resolvers.SubdomainTenantResolver
member.summary: Resolves the tenant from the first label of the request host (subdomain). For example, acme.example.com → tenant slug acme. Single-label hosts (e.g. localhost) are skipped.

member.name: T:MultiTenantAuth.AspNetCore.Validators.DefaultTenantValidator
member.summary:
Default tenant validator. Checks that:
When is true, the user must be authenticated (401 otherwise).
When is true, the user must have a claim matching the resolved tenant (403 otherwise). Both TenantClaimType and AllowedTenantsClaimType are checked.
